extDescription.message: Detects HLS (.m3u8) streams on the page and plays them in a clean, ad-free player. No YouTube, no DRM. You are responsible for ensuring you may access any stream detected.

trust.message: 🔒 Runs on your device. No data leaves your browser.

emptyInitial.message: No stream detected on this tab yet.

emptyScanned.message: No HLS stream found. Some sites only load the stream after you press play — try that, then scan again.

allFailed.message: All sources failed. The stream may have ended or expired.

noStream.message: Open this from the ClearStream popup with a detected stream.

shortcuts.message: Space play · F full screen · M mute · ← → seek · P picture-in-picture
